records.question: Who are the customers named Mr. Edwardo Blanda I with Property policies that ended on or after 2018-02-11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Property' AND customers.customer_details = 'Mr. Edwardo Blanda I' AND customer_policies.end_date >= '2018-02-11'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_policies on customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id where lower(customers.customer_details) like '%mr. edwardo blanda i%' and lower(customer_policies.policy_type_code) like '%property%' and customer_policies.end_date >= '2018-02-11' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter customers by name containing 'mr. edwardo blanda i' and join with customer_policies to find those with 'property' policies that ended on or after 2018-02-11.

records.question: Which customers have policies that ended on or before 2018-03-07?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.end_date <= '2018-03-07'

records.question: Who are the customers where customer_details is Ellsworth Paucek with Property policies that start exactly on 2017-01-20 and end on or before 2017-12-11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.start_date = '2017-01-20' AND customer_policies.end_date <= '2017-12-11' AND customers.customer_details = 'Ellsworth Paucek' AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Property'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_policies on customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id where lower(customers.customer_details) like '%ellsworth paucek%' and lower(customer_policies.policy_type_code) like '%property%' and customer_policies.start_date = '2017-01-20' and customer_policies.end_date <= '2017-12-11' limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by customer_details matching 'ellsworth paucek' and join with customer_policies to find property policies starting on 2017-01-20 and ending on or before 2017-12-11.

records.question: Which customers have Travel policies that started on or after 2017-04-24 and ended on or after 2017-12-14?

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.start_date >= '2017-04-24' AND customer_policies.end_date >= '2017-12-14' AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Travel'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_policies on customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id where lower(customer_policies.policy_type_code) like '%travel%' and customer_policies.start_date >= '2017-04-24' and customer_policies.end_date >= '2017-12-14' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter customers who have policies of type 'Travel' with start and end dates on or after the specified dates by joining Customers and Customer_Policies.
